name: small restaurant owners processing 5–15 cash register logs/day tool
description: For small restaurant owners processing 5–15 cash register logs/day, inefficient manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense report generation instead of manual entry into accounting software.
target_audience: small restaurant owners processing 5–15 cash register logs/day
problem_solved: Inefficient manual entry of cash register logs into accounting systems.
